title: Crop logo image to remove bottom white space for compact header

requirements.summary: Crop the speaker logo image file to remove excess white space underneath the graphic, allowing the slogan to sit closer to the logo and creating a more compact header
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image file has visible white space cropped from the bottom edge
The slogan appears visually closer to the logo graphic due to reduced image padding
The overall header section height is reduced as a result of the tighter logo-slogan spacing
The logo graphic itself remains intact and centered within the cropped image

file_operations.description: Update the BrandingBanner component to reference the newly cropped logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png instead of the current logo file. This will display the cropped version with reduced bottom white space, bringing the slogan visually closer to the logo graphic and making the header more compact overall.
